title: Separate historical card identity from modern reading keywords

positions.summary: Use the surviving complete pack for card numbers, motifs, and French-suit miniatures only.
Use project-authored upright keywords and layout relations as a distinct modern interpretation layer.

default_policy.rationale: Historical identity is the computed fact; modern keywords may be applied only as labeled interpretation.

user_disclosure: Card numbers and suit correspondences are historical identity facts; reading keywords are project-authored and are not claims about the original game.
